---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Program output**
```
If possible, go to "SongRec ☰ menu → About... → Troubleshooting →
Debugging information" and share the obtained information here
(or through an attachment using the "📎" icon of the Github editor)

You can also run SongRec with the "songrec -v" command (or with
the "flatpak run re.fossplant.songrec -v" command if you installed
from Flatpak), and copy-paste terminal output here.

You can also use "songrec -vvv" in order to obtain more output.
```

**Possible attachments**
If the issue happens when trying to recognize a specific song,
you can share it here through using the "📎" icon of the
Github editor.

**Environment (please complete the following information):**
 - Operating system: [e.g. Ubuntu 26.04 LTS, Manjaro]
 - How did you install SongRec? [e.g. Flatpak, Snap, Ubuntu PPA, crates.io, Github source]
 - Version: [e.g. SongRec 0.7.2, git main tree, git commit `abefc5`]

**Additional context**
Anything additional about the problem here.
